Test Cases.topic: Test Case Creation regarding Outbound US
Test Cases.description:
DO’s ✅

For Outbound US, we are going to create Test Cases according to the scenarios given in the US.
Despite how many no. of Campaigns we have, we are going to create test cases according to the scenarios given in the US.

 

 

DON’T’s ❌

Do not create 2 test cases like Stage and Prod.

WWE.description:
Test guidelines in Production

 

Corporate Favorite Testing Guidelines

·       For Adding new Corporate Favorite or Modifying Corporate Favorite

o   Logged in WWE as Production agent

o   Agent Id will be shared by Developer

o   Validate the Newly created or modified Corp. Fav name & Number

o   Logout from Production agent

o   Place a test call from Production Web Simulator by directly dialing the Corp. Favorite number

o   Observed the behavior of call & validate the target. (24/7 or Closed Hours)

o   Call should not be blanked, should not disconnect nor any kind of voice disturbance or error msg

o   If any discrepancy is found during testing, then report the issues on Production/ FDOB Chat. So that everyone will be aware of the issue

 

·       For Removing Corporate Favorite

o   Logged in WWE as Production agent

o   Agent Id will be shared by Developer

o   Validate the Removed Corp. Fav name & Number

o   Name should not populate in Corp. Fav list

o   Logout from Production agent

General.description:
As discussed in our PO meeting, this is the CAG Table Upload workflow we should be using from here on. 

  

Changes/additional steps are in red. 

  

Product Owners: 

1.      Please make sure to send your PRD table upload before Tuesday PO call at 1pm CT. 

2.      Send your email request to EAA and copy the RX PO distro 

3.      If you did not get a confirmation from the EAA team by Tuesday 1pm CT, that your data has been uploaded to PRD, please send a follow up email and make sure to copy Mark and Sam. 

4.      If no response until EOD, please give heads up to UAT team with the US impacted.  

a.       Please note that UAT logs off early. 

b.      UAT tester in STG may not be the tester in PRD so please give a heads up to the entire UAT team not just to 1 member. 

5.      Please coordinate with EAA team during FDOB testing. Mark confirmed they are ready to support as early as 7a CT. 

6.      This process documentation will be added to KC. 

  

UAT: 

1.      PO will share US that may be impacted by PRD Table upload. Kindly test during FDOB. 

2.      No need to communicate to Mark or the EAA team if PRD table is not updated. 

3.      Please continue to update US not tested during deployment night in the Whatsapp group chat with PO team. 

  

@Krishnamurthy, Bharathy FYI on US that may note be tested during the night of deployment because of failed CAG Table upload.
